source: Only our strongest redoubts require our support.\nAutomatically builds §YDefense Fortresses§! around §YBastion Starbases§!
text: Only our strongest redoubts require our support.__PROT_0000__Automatically builds __PROT_0001__Defense Fortresses__PROT_0002__ around __PROT_0003__Bastion Starbases__PROT_0004__

source: This Fleet Doctrine determines what armaments our ship designs should emphasize, at the expense of reduced efficiency with other weapons.
text: This Fleet Doctrine determines what armaments our ship designs should emphasize, at the expense of reduced efficiency with other weapons.

source: We will spread our focus evenly across the weapon types; there is no need to specialize in one to the detriment of the others.
text: We will spread our focus evenly across the weapon types; there is no need to specialize in one to the detriment of the others.

source: Kinetic weapons have a long and storied history. Our Kinetic weapons will tear through enemy shields and hulls and bring glory to our nation.
text: Kinetic weapons have a long and storied history. Our Kinetic weapons will tear through enemy shields and hulls and bring glory to our nation.

source: There is a certain majesty to the manipulation of direct energy to destroy one's foes. Our Energy weapons will burn through enemy ships and melt away their fleets.
text: There is a certain majesty to the manipulation of direct energy to destroy one's foes. Our Energy weapons will burn through enemy ships and melt away their fleets.
